name: Verify Bill Pay Form Load
expected: Bill Pay form loads with biller selection

name: Verify Biller Selection
expected: User can select an existing biller
steps: Assert the biller name is displayed in the input field

name: Verify Add New Biller
expected: User can add a new biller via the dialog
steps: Click Biller dropdown and select 'Add New Biller'
Enter Biller Name and Reference Number in the dialog
Assert the new biller is now selected in the main form

name: Verify Successful Bill Payment
steps: Click Review Payment, then Confirm Payment
Assert confirmation page displays 'Bill Payment Scheduled' or 'Successful'

name: Verify Future Payment Date
expected: User can schedule a bill payment for a future date
steps: Select a Payment Date 5 days in the future
Assert the transaction does not immediately deduct from the balance (since it's scheduled)

name: Verify Insufficient Funds
expected: Error is shown if bill amount exceeds available balance
steps: Enter an amount larger than account balance
